title: aristolochia meridionaliana subsp. meridionaliana
intro: Aristolochia meridionaliana subsp. meridionaliana is a subspecies of flowering plant in the birthwort family, Aristolochiaceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Aristolochia meridionaliana subsp. meridionaliana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being.
